title: AI with 100% win rare over 10 trades
author: sjjhala
selftext:
A Reddit user let ChatGPT trade his Robinhood account using just INR 34,000 (about $400), and the results were shocking. In just 10 days, the account doubled — all while the user relaxed with a cold beer


Please look at this YouTube video and tell me how to upload all this data into chatgpt so it can give me the stocks and their levels to trade ?? 

https://youtu.be/9NYhgztaFao?si=DjjO-zT0ChWQMS76

Thanks
